en: A PSALM OF ASAPH.O God, the nations have come into your inheritance; they have defiled your holy temple; they have laid Jerusalem in ruins.
zh: 神啊！外族人侵入你的產業， 污穢了你的聖殿， 使耶路撒冷成為廢墟。

en: They have given the bodies of your servants to the birds of the heavens for food, the flesh of your faithful to the beasts of the earth.
zh: 他們把你僕人的屍首， 給空中的飛鳥啄食； 把你聖民的肉， 給地上的野獸吞噬。

en: They have poured out their blood like water all around Jerusalem, and there was no one to bury them.
zh: 他們在耶路撒冷的周圍把聖民的血像水一般倒出， 沒有人埋葬他們。

en: We have become a taunt to our neighbors, mocked and derided by those around us.
zh: 我們成為鄰國羞辱的對象， 成為四周的人嗤笑和譏刺的目標。

en: How long, O LORD? Will you be angry forever? Will your jealousy burn like fire?
zh: 耶和華啊！要到幾時呢？ 你要永遠懷怒嗎？ 你的憤恨要像火焚燒嗎？

en: Pour out your anger on the nations that do not know you, and on the kingdoms that do not call upon your name!
zh: 願你把你的烈怒，傾倒在不認識你的外族人， 和不求告你名的列國身上。

en: For they have devoured Jacob and laid waste his habitation.
zh: 因為他們吞吃了雅各， 使他的住處荒涼。

en: Do not remember against us our former iniquities; let your compassion come speedily to meet us, for we are brought very low.
zh: 求你不要記住我們祖先的罪孽； 願你的憐憫快快臨到我們， 因為我們落到極卑微的地步。

en: Help us, O God of our salvation, for the glory of your name; deliver us, and atone for our sins, for your name's sake!
zh: 拯救我們的 神啊！ 求你因你名的榮耀幫助我們； 為你名的緣故， 搭救我們，赦免我們的罪。

en: Why should the nations say, "Where is their God?" Let the avenging of the outpoured blood of your servants be known among the nations before our eyes!
zh: 為甚麼容外族人說： “他們的 神在哪裡呢？” 願我們親眼看見你在列邦中， 使人知道你要為你僕人所流的血伸冤。

en: Let the groans of the prisoners come before you; according to your great power, preserve those doomed to die!
zh: 願被囚的人的唉哼，達到你面前； 願你用你的大能，使那些已定死罪的人可以存留。

en: Return sevenfold into the lap of our neighbors the taunts with which they have taunted you, O Lord!
zh: 主啊！願你把我們鄰國羞辱你的羞辱， 七倍歸還在他們身上。

en: But we your people, the sheep of your pasture, will give thanks to you forever; from generation to generation we will recount your praise.
zh: 這樣，我們作你的子民，作你牧場上的羊的， 要永遠稱謝你； 我們要世世代代述說你可稱頌的事。
